case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. RAYMOND C KNOLES ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-20-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) RAYMOND C KNOLES OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT; OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE FEB-07-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100029766), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMBILE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED SEP-12-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE SEP-13-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, JUAN
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100032027)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-27-2017 CONTINUED TO FEB-07-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT KNOLES, RAYMOND C SANTOS, JUAN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-27-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-26-2018
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-20-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
